enriched_points.expanded_content: Ergonomics is crucial in human-robot collaboration as it enhances worker comfort and productivity while minimizing the risk of injury and strain, leading to safer work environments.

Designing robotic systems with ergonomic principles ensures optimal interaction between humans and robots, improving task efficiency and promoting user satisfaction through intuitive controls and adaptable interfaces.

Implementing ergonomic assessments in robotic workspaces reduces physical stress on workers, leading to lower fatigue levels and enhanced performance, ultimately contributing to overall workplace safety.
